actionCalls.name: Checks_if_the_selected_category_has_questions_with_additional_comments_Action
actionCalls.label: Checks if the selected category has questions with additional comments.

assignments.description: Assign the answers to the questions to a list of answers object
assignments.name: Assign_Answer_to_Questions
assignments.label: Assign Answer to Questions

assignments.description: Assign the update answers to the questions to a list of answers object
assignments.name: Assign_Updates_Answer_to_Questions
assignments.label: Assign Updates Answer to Questions

assignments.description: Set the BOM on the project record for the RFx
assignments.name: Set_Project_BOM
assignments.label: Set Project BOM

assignments.description: Set the query values needed to pull the correct questions
assignments.name: Set_Question_Query_Variables
assignments.label: Set Question Query Variables

assignments.description: Set the User Role based on user Input
assignments.name: Set_User_Role_from_Input
assignments.label: Set User Role from Input

collectionProcessors.description: Due to bug with query on multiselect, filter on the RFx Type here
collectionProcessors.name: Filter_RFx_Type_AE
collectionProcessors.label: Filter RFx Type - AE

collectionProcessors.description: Due to bug with query on multiselect, filter on the RFx Type here
collectionProcessors.name: Filter_RFx_Type_SE
collectionProcessors.label: Filter RFx Type - SE

value.stringValue: No, we have a solution that meets some of the functional, technical, and security requirements, but there are many gaps that can’t be closed or will require too much customization.

This score to this question is system generated based on the SE’s completed GNG answers as either -90 (Not a Fit for Salesforce) or +10 (Fit for Salesforce). The SE GNG question points need to total 40 or greater in order to obtain +10 system generated score.
Yes, we have a solution that can meet the functional, technical, and security requirements. Any functional gaps can be met with AppExchange apps or minimum custom development.

decisions.description: Check to see if we need to update an existing answer
decisions.name: Check_if_Existing_Answer
decisions.label: Check if Existing Answer

decisions.description: Check the project object to see if we set the number of GNG questions
decisions.name: Is_of_GNG_Questions_Set
decisions.label: Is # of GNG Questions Set

decisions.description: Check to see if we were called from the creation of a NEW project
decisions.name: Is_this_a_New_Project
decisions.label: Is this a New Project

decisions.name: Is_this_an_SE_Role
decisions.label: Is this an SE Sales Role

decisions.name: Is_this_an_SE_Sales_Role
decisions.label: Is this an SE Sales Role

Flow.description: 8/21 updated BOM verbiage for multi-selecting products -- 2025-06-05 - JCDJ - W-000641: Skip "Go / No Go Questions" screen component when Additional Comments Only is selected and there is not answers for the selected category. BOM overwrite fix. 2025-05-28 - JCDJ - W-000641: Hide BOM screen when additional comments only is selected. 2025-05-26 - JCDJ - Show additional comments toggle and filter question selection. 2025-04-08 - JCDJ - CommitTransaction step at the end of the flow. 2025-02-21 - JCDJ - Issue with SE path. 2025-02-21 - JCDJ - Duplication fix (WORKING VERSION). 2025-01-31 - Updated overrideQuestionText value 2025-01-03 - removed the find territory variable and returned to the opportunity territory variable that is input to this process. GPS Pub Sec GnG Process Flow - Removed the check and update of Project Status to Status Flow - this will just move into the process

formulas.description: Determine the territory from the role
formulas.name: findOpptyTerr

Flow.label: GPS RFP Go No Go Process

loops.description: Looks the list of existing answers to see if we need to update an answer vs create a new answer
loops.name: Loop_Existing_Answers
loops.label: Loop Existing Answers

fields.name: dtBOMprocessinstruct
fields.fieldText:
Complete the following required questions. Note, you can require and update questions several times before submitting them to the RFx Team.


To select multiple products, hold Ctrl while clicking each item.

fields.name: dtBOMinstruct
fields.fieldText: Select the products that define the Bill of Materials (BOM) for this RFx

value.stringValue: Show questions with additional comments only?

fields.name: AdditionalCommentsOnlyMessage
fields.fieldText: Questions needing intake follow-up are categorized. Review and click through the entire flow to see all.

fields.name: Unavailable
fields.fieldText: Go / No Go Questions are unavailable at this status.

fields.name: dtWidgetInformation
fields.fieldText: Complete the following required questions. Note, you can require and update questions several times before submitting them to the RFx Team

fields.name: dtError
fields.fieldText:
Error Occurred

Please contact Admin

fields.name: dtThankYou
fields.fieldText: Go / No Go Questions for {!userRole} is Completed

fields.name: dtOverAllGNGScore
fields.fieldText: You GNG Score is: {!OverAllGNGScore}

fields.name: noAdditionalQuestions
fields.fieldText: No additional comment answers were found for {!userRole}.

variables.description: The list of answers to create in the database
variables.name: GNGAnswertoQuestionsList

variables.description: Base project object for all updated values
variables.name: NewProject

variables.description: The type of RFx the GNG is set for
variables.name: rfxType

variables.description: this is the userRole executing the flow
variables.name: userRole
